# V2 TARGET REPOSITORY TREE (annotated)
#
# Derived 1:1 from the audited V1 (maldous/react): apps platform-api +
# react-enterprise-app, ~52 packages, tools/scripts/infra/docker/services/e2e/
# config/docs/adr. V2 reuses every proven V1 asset, refined into clean,
# final-state names. NO legacy/temp/transitional naming. NO vague buckets.
#
# Legend:  [=] move-as-is from V1   [~] refine/rename from V1   [+] new clean home
#          [AI] visual layer regenerated by AI; behaviour/semantics preserved from V1
#
# ============================================================================
# ROOT
# ============================================================================
react-v2/
├── apps/                                  # deployable applications (only 2)
│   ├── platform-api/                      # [=] BFF + server-only authority (hexagonal core)
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── index.ts                   # composition root / process entry
│   │   │   ├── server/                    # [=] HTTP edge: pipeline, routes, auth, forward-auth,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     graphql mount, health, session, tenant-resolver,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     otel-init, worker-registry, webhook-worker-runtime
│   │   │   │   ├── http.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── pipeline.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── routes.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── auth.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── forward-auth.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── authorize-resource.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── tenant-resolver.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── session.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── graphql.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── health.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── observability.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── otel-init.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── provisioning.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── token-crypto.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── oidc-http-fetcher.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── worker-registry.ts
│   │   │   │   ├── webhook-worker-runtime.ts
│   │   │   │   └── dependencies.ts        # DI wiring (ports → adapters)
│   │   │   ├── usecases/                  # [=] application services (one file per capability)
│   │   │   │   │                          #     auth, members, groups, organisation, audit,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     api-keys, rate-limits, quota, entitlements,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     features, search, events, notifications,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     observability, metering, history, secrets,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     provider-config, composed-providers,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     environment-registry, scheduled-jobs,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     capability-registry, clickthrough-services,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     idp-management, idp-mapping, oidc-discovery,
│   │   │   │   │                          #     profile, platform-config, platform-services …
│   │   │   ├── ports/                     # [=] interfaces the core depends on (repositories,
│   │   │   │                              #     event-bus, billing-provider, routing-probe …)
│   │   │   ├── adapters/                  # [=] driven adapters: postgres-*, redis-*, smtp-*,
│   │   │   │                              #     openbao-secret-store, http-webhook-dispatcher,
│   │   │   │                              #     compose-environment-operation, crypto …
│   │   │   ├── db/                        # [=] migrate, seed, reset, migrations/ (forward-only)
│   │   │   │   └── migrations/            #     checksum-immutable; add forward, never edit
│   │   │   ├── config/                    # [=] api-process config loaders
│   │   │   └── types/                     # [=] local ambient typings (e.g. nodemailer.d.ts)
│   │   ├── package.json
│   │   ├── tsconfig.json
│   │   └── README.md
│   │
│   └── web/                               # [~] V1 react-enterprise-app, renamed to final state
│       ├── src/
│       │   ├── main.tsx                   # [=] SPA entry
│       │   ├── index.ts
│       │   ├── app/                       # [=] app-wide singletons: router, query-client, shell-store
│       │   ├── routes/                    # [=] TanStack Router file routes (admin/, organisation/,
│       │   │                              #     _authenticated, __root, login, index, e2e-harness)
│       │   ├── routeTree.gen.ts           # [=] generated; hand-edited only where V1 documents it
│       │   ├── features/                  # feature slices (one dir per capability)
│       │   │   ├── _template/             # [=] canonical slice template: FeaturePage, components/,
│       │   │   │                          #     feature.queries.ts, feature.mutations.ts,
│       │   │   │                          #     feature.schema.ts, __tests__/
│       │   │   ├── admin/                 # [AI] visual regenerated; queries/mutations/schema/perms preserved
│       │   │   ├── admin-account/         # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-auth/            # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-clickthrough/    # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-config/          # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-developer/       # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-domains/         # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-email/           # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-entitlements/    # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-events/          # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-features/        # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-logs/            # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-members/         # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-monitoring/      # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-observability/   # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-platform/        # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-readiness/       # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-scheduled-jobs/  # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-search/          # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-storage/         # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-usage/           # [AI]
│       │   │   ├── admin-webhooks/        # [AI]
│       │   │   └── organisation/          # [AI]
│       │   ├── components/                # [AI] app-shell chrome: AppShell, AdminLayout,
│       │   │                              #     AuthenticatedLayout, RequirePermission,
│       │   │                              #     Default{Error,NotFound,Pending}Component
│       │   ├── auth/                      # [=] client auth/session glue (no Keycloak SDK here)
│       │   ├── hooks/                     # [=] cross-feature React hooks (named, not a junk bucket)
│       │   ├── observability/             # [=] browser RUM/trace propagation
│       │   ├── theme/                     # [AI] design tokens / theme provider
│       │   ├── styles/                    # [AI] global styles
│       │   ├── msw/                       # [=] MSW handlers mirroring BFF contracts (test/dev only)
│       │   └── tests/                     # [=] app-level test harness + test-setup.ts
│       ├── package.json
│       ├── tsconfig.json
│       └── README.md
│
├── packages/                              # ~52 workspace libraries, layered by hexagon role
│   ├── contracts/                         # [~] PURE shared types/schemas (no runtime deps)
│   │   ├── admin/                         # [~] was contracts-admin
│   │   ├── analytics/                     # [~] was contracts-analytics
│   │   ├── auth/                          # [~] was contracts-auth
│   │   ├── graphql/                       # [~] was contracts-graphql
│   │   ├── ingestion/                     # [~] was contracts-ingestion
│   │   └── organisation/                  # [~] was contracts-organisation
│   ├── domain/                            # [~] pure domain logic (no IO)
│   │   ├── core/                          # [~] was domain-core
│   │   └── identity/                      # [~] was domain-identity
│   ├── runtime/                           # [~] framework-agnostic application runtimes (ports + logic)
│   │   ├── api/                           # [~] api-runtime
│   │   ├── authorisation/                 # [~] authorisation-runtime
│   │   ├── config/                        # [~] config-runtime
│   │   ├── email/                         # [~] email-runtime
│   │   ├── graphql-api/                   # [~] graphql-api-runtime
│   │   ├── i18n/                          # [~] i18n-runtime (ADR-0026; react.ts bootstrap status-gated)
│   │   ├── notification/                  # [~] notification-runtime
│   │   ├── profile-configuration/         # [~] profile-configuration
│   │   ├── queue/                         # [~] queue-runtime
│   │   ├── search/                        # [~] search-runtime
│   │   ├── session/                       # [~] session-runtime
│   │   ├── storage/                       # [~] storage-runtime
│   │   ├── runtime-context/               # [~] platform-runtime-context
│   │   └── worker/                        # [~] worker-runtime
│   ├── adapters/                          # [~] driven adapters (the ONLY packages allowed external SDKs)
│   │   ├── brevo/                         # [~] adapters-brevo
│   │   ├── clickhouse/                    # [~] adapters-clickhouse
│   │   ├── graphql/                       # [~] adapters-graphql
│   │   ├── ingestion/                     # [~] adapters-ingestion
│   │   ├── keycloak/                      # [~] adapters-keycloak (Keycloak SDK confined here)
│   │   ├── loki/                          # [~] adapters-loki
│   │   ├── object-storage/                # [~] adapters-object-storage
│   │   ├── opentelemetry/                 # [~] adapters-opentelemetry
│   │   ├── postgres/                      # [~] adapters-postgres
│   │   ├── redis/                         # [~] adapters-redis
│   │   └── sentry/                        # [~] adapters-sentry
│   ├── platform/                          # [~] cross-cutting platform primitives (importable everywhere allowed)
│   │   ├── errors/                        # [~] platform-errors (typed error envelope; never raw Error)
│   │   ├── logging/                       # [~] platform-logging (pino confined here + adapters/api)
│   │   ├── observability/                 # [~] platform-observability (NO OTEL SDK import)
│   │   ├── access-control/                # [~] access-control (permission model)
│   │   ├── security-auth/                 # [~] security-auth
│   │   ├── audit-events/                  # [~] audit-events
│   │   └── observability-signals/         # [~] observability (signal taxonomy)
│   ├── frontend/                          # [~] browser-side shared libraries
│   │   ├── ui-design-system/              # [AI] components/ + lib/ — visual layer regenerated
│   │   └── graphql-browser-client/        # [~] graphql-browser-client (TypedDocumentNode + TanStack)
│   ├── infra/                             # [~] cloud infra TypeScript modules (not Terraform HCL)
│   │   ├── aws/                           # [~] infra-aws
│   │   └── cloudflare/                    # [~] infra-cloudflare
│   ├── tooling/                           # [~] build/dev tooling libraries
│   │   ├── ci/                            # [~] tooling-ci
│   │   ├── codegen/                       # [~] tooling-codegen
│   │   ├── docker/                        # [~] tooling-docker
│   │   └── terraform/                     # [~] tooling-terraform
│   └── testing/                           # [~] test-only shared code
│       ├── test-support/                  # [~] test-support (fixtures, builders, helpers)
│       └── dev-services/                  # [~] dev-services (local stand-ins)
│
├── tools/                                 # [=] repo automation (architecture governance + gates)
│   ├── architecture/                      # [=] orchestrator + validators (boundaries, i18n,
│   │   │                                  #     compose-ports, action-register, lifecycle, inventory)
│   │   ├── orchestrator/
│   │   ├── _shared/
│   │   ├── generate-package-readmes/
│   │   ├── generate-package-inventory/
│   │   ├── generate-lifecycle-reports/
│   │   ├── validate-action-register/
│   │   ├── validate-compose-ports/
│   │   ├── validate-frontend-conventions/
│   │   ├── validate-i18n/
│   │   └── validate-lifecycle-evidence/
│   ├── coverage/                          # [=] lcov normalisation
│   ├── e2e/                               # [=] result-contract, scenario-manifest, trace assertions
│   ├── generate-feature/                  # [=] feature-slice scaffolder (mirrors _template)
│   ├── quality/                           # [=] sonar-quality-gate
│   ├── semgrep/                           # [=] custom rules.yml
│   └── mcp/                               # [=] platform-governor MCP server
│       └── platform-governor/
│
├── scripts/                               # [=] operational shell/node scripts (Makefile callees)
│   ├── stages/                            # [=] dev→test→staging→prod confidence ladder (run-stage.sh)
│   ├── compose/                           # [=] compose config validators
│   ├── env/                               # [=] env manifest generation (ADR-0072; .env/ generated)
│   ├── keycloak/                          # [=] realm/auth proof scripts
│   ├── backup/                            # [=] local backup/restore
│   ├── sonar/                             # [=]
│   ├── sentry/                            # [=]
│   ├── smoke/                             # [=]
│   ├── preflight/                         # [=]
│   ├── evidence/                          # [=]
│   ├── tests/                             # [=]
│   ├── tilt/                              # [=]
│   └── clean/                             # [=]
│
├── e2e/                                   # [=] stage-aware Playwright suites (ADR-0075/ADR-ACT-0285)
│   ├── internal/                          # [=] in-app journeys
│   ├── identity/                          # [=] Keycloak/auth journeys
│   ├── external/                          # [=] third-party-mock journeys
│   ├── discovery/                         # [=] route/contract discovery
│   ├── prod/                              # [=] live prod smoke
│   ├── support/                           # [=] shared fixtures/page-objects
│   ├── suite-registry.json                # [=] registry gated by make all
│   ├── scenario-manifest.json             # [=]
│   ├── persona-registry.json              # [=]
│   └── ui-contract.json                   # [=] semantic UI contract (anchors AI-regenerated UI)
│
├── services/                              # [=] auxiliary standalone services (local/test only)
│   └── mock-oidc/                         # [=] mock OIDC IdP (src/, Dockerfile)
│
├── docker/                                # [=] container build + service config (one dir per service)
│   ├── caddy/  postgres/  clickhouse/  keycloak/  grafana/  loki/  tempo/
│   ├── otel/   alloy/     sentry/       pgadmin/   wiremock/
│   ├── entrypoint-api.sh
│   └── compose-wrapper.sh
│
├── infra/                                 # [~] Terraform HCL (state files NOT committed in V2)
│   ├── bin/                               # [=] tf wrapper
│   ├── modules/                           # [=] reusable TF modules
│   └── env/                               # [~] one canonical name per stage: dev/ staging/ prod/ test/
│                                          #     (V1 dev+development and prod+production aliases collapsed)
│
├── config/                                # [=] non-secret stage config
│   └── environments/                      # [=] common.json + shared.json + {dev,test,staging,prod}.json
│
├── make/                                  # [=] Makefile includes (split by concern)
│   │                                      #     core, compose, test, e2e, quality, env, stages,
│   └──                                    #     evidence, tools, clean, help
│
├── docs/                                  # [=] governance + design source of truth
│   ├── adr/                               # [=] ADRs + ACTION-REGISTER.md (authoritative numbering)
│   ├── architecture/                      # [=] import-boundary-rules.json + diagrams
│   ├── api/                               # [=] openapi.json baseline + README (drift gate)
│   ├── CODEMAPS/                          # [=]
│   ├── evidence/                          # [=] per-area proof bundles (ADR-0007)
│   ├── patterns/                          # [=]
│   ├── schemas/                           # [=]
│   ├── security/                          # [=]
│   ├── slices/                            # [=]
│   ├── specs/                             # [=]
│   ├── local-development/                 # [=] compose-services, tilt-workflow docs
│   └── v2-foundation/                     # [=] this migration's planning artefacts (THIS dir)
│
├── .devcontainer/                         # [=] devcontainer.json + post-create.sh (secret-free, idempotent)
├── .github/                               # [=] CI workflows
│
# ---- root config files (final-state, V1 parity) ----
├── compose.yaml                           # [=] single source of compose topology + profiles
├── Tiltfile                               # [=] inner-loop control plane (ADR-0027)
├── Makefile                               # [=] canonical entrypoint (includes make/*.mk)
├── package.json                           # [=] workspace root
├── package-lock.json                      # [=]
├── tsconfig.base.json                     # [=]
├── tsconfig.sonar.json                    # [=]
├── codegen.ts                             # [=] graphql-codegen config
├── eslint.config.mjs                      # [=]
├── knip.json  .dependency-cruiser.cjs     # [=] dead-code + boundary linters
├── playwright.*.config.ts                 # [=] one config per e2e stage (internal/identity/external/
│                                          #     discovery/prod/build)
├── sonar-project.properties               # [=]
├── osv-scanner.toml  .gitleaks.toml  .spectral.yaml  renovate.json  lefthook.yml
├── .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc  .prettierrc.json  .prettierignore  .dockerignore  .gitignore
└── README.md                              # [=]
#
# ============================================================================
# EXPLICITLY EXCLUDED FROM V2 (present in V1 working tree, NOT carried over):
#   coverage/  reports/  e2e-results/  playwright-report/  .scannerwork/
#   node_modules/  .tilt.log  .tilt.pid  .swarm/  .ruflo/  .serena/ .remember/
#   .agents/ .playwright-mcp/ agentdb.rvf* ruvector.db .password  .env/ (generated)
#   infra/**/terraform.tfstate*  — build/scan/agent artefacts and secrets, never committed.
# ============================================================================
